settings.heading: Go Further
settings.subtitle: Elite Foot Protection for Long Distance Runners

settings.quote: Aura is the only product I trust for hundred-mile races. It holds up when nothing else does.
settings.author: Matty H.

settings.title: Protection
settings.subtitle: Barrier technology for the long haul

settings.title: Presence
settings.subtitle: Forget the friction, find the flow

settings.how_to_apply: Apply generously to friction-prone areas before your run. Reapply every 4-6 hours during extended efforts.
settings.ingredients_list: Coconut Oil, Beeswax, Cocoa Butter, Vitamin E, Zinc Oxide, Shea Butter
settings.ingredients_description: Each ingredient is selected for its proven ability to create a lasting moisture barrier while nourishing the skin through hours of repetitive movement.

settings.name: Coconut Oil
settings.description: Creates a breathable moisture barrier that protects skin during extended activity while providing deep hydration.

settings.name: Beeswax
settings.description: Natural wax that forms a protective film, reducing friction between skin surfaces and clothing.

settings.name: Vitamin E
settings.description: Powerful antioxidant that supports skin healing and protects against environmental damage during outdoor activity.

settings.heading: Join the Community
settings.description: Get exclusive access to training tips, product drops, and stories from the trail. Join a growing collective of runners who believe in going further.
